texto: I do not want God to give me what I want; I trust Him to give me what I need. The truth is, He is infinitely wiser than I am. If we always get what we ask for, I for one will cease to pray.
explicacao: Citação de Gary Inrig sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I do not want God to give me what I want; I trust Him to give me what I need. The truth is, He is…” articula reflexao, prayer, trust em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
